comment.body:
OMik : Show some compassion. It is fair to say Alma is a maestro and her levels work. Not fair to say moves are obvious to everyone on the chat  since there are fakeouts and all of us will be susceptible to emotion while trading. It is possible one noted the levels and maybe longed at 6342 which was a fakeout and if one played calls they could have lost. Also Angbadada played puts just like myself from yesterday and entry was early. Sniffed out the fall correctly but entry was bad given the premarket run up from the tariff tapebomb that Orange man dropped right at close yesterday. 

In the trump regime one has to be super nimble and careful with sizing. Different trading styles and there will be days when one will lose irrespective of calling the levels correctly since entry and timing are equally important.
